content: Phase 1: Multi-tenant backend foundation + platform auth/seed
Phase 1: Platform /superadmin panel (create/list/manage companies + per-tenant seed)
Phase 1 POC: automated tenant-isolation test (35/35 passed)
Phase 2: Full tenant admin dashboard + public booking flow, tenant-scoped
Phase 2: Tenant-aware frontend routing + X-Tenant interceptor
Phase 3: 7-day trial logic + status gating + trial banner + lock screens
Phase 4: White-label branding + logo upload (base64) + per-tenant email theming
Phase 2-4: End-to-end testing (backend 98.2%, isolation 100%, gating 100%, frontend 95%)
Phase 5: Docker/Dockge compose + Dockerfiles + Nginx path-routing + README 'add a client' checklist
